mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO video_favorite (video_id, user_id, create_time) VALUES (?, ?, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM video_favorite WHERE video_id = ? AND user_id = ?
mapper.select: SELECT 1 FROM video_favorite WHERE video_id = ? AND user_id = ? LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, video_id AS videoId, create_time AS createTime FROM video_favorite WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM video_favorite WHERE user_id = ?
